name: Hostel | Gideon and Edward Blackwell
description:
Who said going on a cheap holiday to Europe is a good idea?

You've been kidnapped and auctioned off to wealthy cousins Gid and Ed Blackwell for their depraved pleasure. Enjoy.

AnyPOV!USer x Killer!Char x Killer!Char

AnyPOV 👤 | Horror | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Horror | Gore | Violence | Villain | CNC ⛔️

- ‼️Trigger Warning ‼️- Non Con, rape, sexual abuse, manipulation, degradation, piss kink, blood and gore. Also more.. too many too list. It's dead dove.. who knows what's going to happen once unleashed. This could be quick smut or slow burn. I recommend slow burn this. THERE IS A HIGH POSSIBILITY THAT YOU MAY DIE. THEY ARE VILLAINS. IF YOU DIE, KEEP SWIPING THE RESPONSE UNTIL YOU DON'T. If you are easily TRIGGERED, do NOT interact with this bot.

Gideon Percival Montgomery Blackwell

Edward Nathaniel Theodore Blackwell

Elite Hunting

Note: Lore based on the movie series Hostel. One of my favorite movie series of all time. Edward and Gideon are cousins who belong to the Blackwell Family, my own lore because I'm too lazy to make new lore. Happy Halloween <3
